hero.name: Yaman Chapagin
hero.tagline: Creating websites and videos with creativity and precision

about.bio: I'm Yaman Chapagin, a 17-year-old web developer and video editor from Nepal. I started video editing in 2020 using Kinemaster and later moved to CapCut, improving my editing skills over time. In 2024, I began learning web development and started building projects like chat applications and tracking websites. I enjoy creating digital projects and continuously improving my skills.
about.vision: To grow as a developer and video editor and create projects that people find useful and enjoyable.
